overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks under a monorail overpass, crosses a busy intersection at Drake Ave, and continues along the sidewalk past holographic advertisements and towering cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated monorail track

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the monorail structure, passing neon signs and concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: elevated train track structure with metal beams and supports running overhead
vertical red neon signs with Asian characters on the left side of the street
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street level
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overhead monorail structure

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated monorail track in a futuristic cyberpunk city. Neon signs glow on the left while concrete support pillars line the right. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera moves forward under the artificial lighting.

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into the open intersection with visible sky
waiting at the corner for passing vehicles before crossing Drake Ave

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and beginning to cross the street, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan with red taillights driving under the overpass

entered.detail: street sign reading 'Drake Ave' mounted on a pole at the intersection corner
multi-story teal-green building with geometric windows and industrial details
large glowing advertisements and digital displays on building facades
piles of garbage bags stacked near the building wall

segments.scene_description: Approaching the intersection at Drake Ave as the covered sidewalk opens up. The tall green cyberpunk building becomes visible across the street with holographic billboards. Pedestrians gather at the corner while futuristic vehicles pass by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and holographic advertisements

events.description: crossing the red and white striped crosswalk while trucks and cars navigate the intersection
turning slightly right to align with the opposite sidewalk while continuing to cross

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, dodging between vehicles and other pedestrians in the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: large blue truck driving through the intersection from left to right
white SUV waiting at the intersection before proceeding

entered.detail: red neon sign reading 'FOODSCAPE' on the green building facade
elevated walkway ramp with metal railings leading up to a pedestrian bridge
wide crosswalk with distinctive red and white striped pattern

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide intersection with red-striped crosswalk markings while various vehicles including trucks and SUVs pass through. The green cyberpunk building with the 'FOODSCAPE' neon sign dominates the right side as the camera moves from the covered overpass into the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: entering the covered sidewalk area with ground-level storefronts and bright neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk past storefronts and other pedestrians, approaching a ramp structure

notable_agents.action: person in bright blue and green athletic wear walking briskly past the camera

entered.detail: ground-level shop windows with illuminated displays and signage
construction barriers and railings near the pedestrian ramp entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk past the green cyberpunk building's storefronts. The 'FOODSCAPE' sign is now prominent up close. Pedestrians walk in the same direction as the camera approaches a ramp structure leading to an elevated walkway, with neon lights illuminating the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban corridor into the open, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic city intersection. It begins along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated monorail track, moving past concrete support pillars and glowing neon signs under artificial light. As the camera approaches Drake Ave, the covered walkway opens up to reveal a towering green cyberpunk building adorned with holographic billboards and a gathering of pedestrians. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses a wide, red-striped intersection amidst a flow of futuristic trucks and SUVs, moving from the shadow of the overpass into the open street. Finally, the movement continues along the opposite sidewalk, passing closely by the prominent Foodscape neon sign before approaching a ramp that leads toward an elevated walkway.
